overall_recommendation: Start with the agent-evaluation Signal, request more evidence on the memory-controls Signal, hold the inference-cost Signal for later review, regenerate thin research analysis, and do not publish yet.

decision_grade_candidates.title: Independent agent evaluation benchmark exposes reliability gap in multi-step tool use
decision_grade_candidates.source_authority: Independent evaluation lab release with methodology notes and reproducible task descriptions.
decision_grade_candidates.executive_takeaway: The most important Signal is that agent progress is now being constrained by reliability across long tool-use chains, not only raw reasoning scores.
decision_grade_candidates.why_it_matters: For DysonX, this is decision-grade because it gives the Owner a concrete way to judge whether agent announcements are durable capability gains or demos that fail under longer workflows.
decision_grade_candidates.watch_next: Watch whether model labs respond with benchmark-specific reliability improvements, tool-call recovery mechanisms, or public eval disclosures over the next two release cycles.
decision_grade_candidates.risk_summary: No critical risk flags; still needs later confidence and correlation review before any publish-readiness path.
decision_grade_candidates.score_explanation: Score 58/65 (89.23%) maps to Tier A: Decision-grade Signal.

useful_review_queue.title: AI workspace vendors converge on persistent memory controls for enterprise assistants
useful_review_queue.source_authority: First-party product changelog plus implementation notes; useful but not yet independently verified.
useful_review_queue.executive_takeaway: Enterprise assistant products are shifting from stateless chat toward governed persistent memory.
useful_review_queue.why_it_matters: This helps the Owner track when memory becomes a product infrastructure layer instead of a user-facing feature toggle.
useful_review_queue.watch_next: Watch whether vendors expose audit logs, retention controls, and cross-tool memory boundaries for regulated customers.
useful_review_queue.risk_summary: Useful but needs more source support and comparison against at least one other vendor announcement.
useful_review_queue.score_explanation: Score 44/65 (67.69%) maps to Tier B: Useful Signal.

useful_review_queue.title: Chip vendor reports lower serving cost for long-context inference
useful_review_queue.source_authority: First-party technical note with enough detail for tracking but no independent benchmark yet.
useful_review_queue.executive_takeaway: Serving efficiency may be improving, but the Signal is not urgent without an independent workload comparison.
useful_review_queue.why_it_matters: Lower serving cost can change which agent workflows are economically viable, but this does not yet require immediate Owner action.
useful_review_queue.watch_next: Watch for third-party benchmarks or customer deployment reports using the same long-context workload.
useful_review_queue.risk_summary: Useful but not urgent; keep for later review or correlation.
useful_review_queue.score_explanation: Score 41/65 (63.08%) maps to Tier B: Useful Signal.

blocked_or_low_value.title: Robotics safety memorandum may affect embodied-agent deployment claims
blocked_or_low_value.source_authority: Government memorandum summary; primary text is referenced but not sufficiently interpreted.
blocked_or_low_value.executive_takeaway: The item may matter for robotics deployment, but the current analysis does not yet explain the practical capability impact.
blocked_or_low_value.why_it_matters: Policy constraints can reshape robotics timelines, but this Signal needs stronger interpretation before it is useful to the Owner.
blocked_or_low_value.watch_next: Watch for implementation guidance, industry responses, and whether labs change safety case disclosures.
blocked_or_low_value.risk_summary: Needs regeneration because capability impact and owner decision value are underdeveloped.
blocked_or_low_value.score_explanation: Score 32/65 (49.23%) maps to Tier C: Needs Review.

blocked_or_low_value.title: Several companies say AI demand remains strong
blocked_or_low_value.source_authority: Secondhand market roundup with vague sourcing and no first-source evidence.
blocked_or_low_value.executive_takeaway: This item is too generic to support an Owner decision.
blocked_or_low_value.why_it_matters: It does not yet matter for DysonX because it lacks source authority, AGI capability mapping, and a concrete watch-next point.
blocked_or_low_value.watch_next: Do not track unless a first-source earnings call, product metric, or compute deployment claim appears.
blocked_or_low_value.risk_summary: Blocked by generic-summary and weak-attribution risks.
